title: LogoTime
text: LogoTime Specifies the time, in seconds, that the splash screen logo is displayed. This setting applies only to the Uniface runtime on Windows, not to the Uniface IDE. LogoTime = Seconds | OFF | 0 Arguments Seconds —alowed values are 0 through 60 . OFF —logo is switched off completely 0 —a small window is displayed while Uniface is loading. Default value: 3 File section: [application] Related Links Logo Specifies the name of an image file to be used as the application splash screen logo. This setting applies only to the Uniface runtime on Windows, not to the Uniface IDE. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
